title: PJM AS Market Results Real Time Hourly JSON API
description:
Real-time hourly ancillary service prices and volumes for PJM. This includes Regulation, Synchronized Reserves, Primary Reserves, and Thirty Minute Reserves, and covers the entire RTO, Mid-Atlantic/Dominion (MAD), and Baltimore/Pepco/Dominion (BPD) locales.

This data series ends in the autumn of 2022, when PJM implemented Comprehensive Pricing Reform which altered price formation for reserves.
